title: CareerZone – Recruitment Platform
description: Developed backend services and RESTful APIs for recruitment management workflows, supporting role-based operations for 3+ user types. Built full-stack features using MERN stack, enabling end-to-end recruitment processes (job posting, application handling, and status tracking). Designed and optimized MongoDB schemas, improving query performance. Implemented authentication and authorization using JWT. Performed API testing using Postman and Playwright. Collaborated in Agile/Scrum environment.

title: Cosmetic E-commerce Website
description: Developed a full-stack E-commerce application using Spring Boot MVC architecture, supporting product browsing, cart, and order management. Implemented secure authentication and authorization using Spring Security with role-based access control (Admin/User). Designed and optimized relational database schema using SQL Server and JPA/Hibernate. Built responsive UI using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, and jQuery. Integrated RESTful APIs between frontend and backend.

title: Handmade Mobile App
description: Developed Android application using Java/Kotlin with MVVM architecture, improving code separation and maintainability. Implemented core features including authentication, chatbot interaction, purchasing system, and order history tracking. Designed and optimized MySQL database to support scalable mobile workflows and user data management. Integrated RESTful APIs for backend communication and real-time data synchronization. Applied clean architecture principles.
